DataRequest.Name: Microsoft Exchange Autodiscover RCE ProxyNotShell Detected on Network / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Microsoft Exchange Autodiscover RCE (CVE-2022-41040, CVE-2022-41082) detected on Network
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: Microsoft Exchange Autodiscover RCE detected from $srcIpAddr to dest $destIpAddr
DataRequest.Remediation:
Investigate the given target IP and scan for malware
https://doublepulsar.com/proxynotshell-the-story-of-the-claimed-zero-day-in-microsoft-exchange-5c63d963a9e9

SubPattern.name: threat
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: ((eventType CONTAIN "FortiGate-ips-" OR eventType CONTAIN "FortiGate-antivirus" OR eventType CONTAIN "FortiClient-av" OR eventType CONTAIN "FortiProxy-" OR eventType CONTAIN "FortiEDR-") AND hostIpAddr IS NULL AND (vulnId IN (50584,1090501428,1090501376) OR ipsSignatureId IN (50584,1090501428,1090501376) OR attackContextId IN ("50584","1090501428","1090501376") OR attackName="MS.Exchange.Server.Autodiscover.Remote.Code.Execution")) OR (eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitWebTraffic) AND (infoURL REGEXP ".*autodiscover\\.json.*\\@.*Powershell.*" OR uriStem REGEXP ".*autodiscover\\.json.*\\@.*Powershell.*"))
